$schema: Deep biography schema for billionaire profiles on 부자사주 — BATCH 3 (Bilingual EN/KO)
$instructions:
For each billionaire listed below, research and fill in as many fields as possible. Use Wikipedia, Forbes, Bloomberg, and reliable news sources.

IMPORTANT RULES:
1. Every text field must have BOTH English AND Korean versions. English fields keep their original names; Korean fields add a 'Ko' suffix (e.g., 'earlyLife' for English, 'earlyLifeKo' for Korean).
2. Korean text should be natural, fluent Korean — not machine-translated.
3. The 'eventKo' field MUST be the direct Korean translation of the corresponding 'event' field on the SAME object. Do NOT shift or reorder translations. Each eventKo must match its sibling event exactly.
4. All monetary values in wealthHistory MUST be in BILLIONS USD (e.g., 24.5 means $24.5 billion). Do NOT use raw dollar amounts like 24500000000.
5. The 'id' field MUST match the id shown in the targetList below. Double-check this.
6. Save each file in scripts/deep-bios/ with the naming convention shown below.

careerTimeline.event: Married David Koch, industrialist and co-owner of Koch Industries
careerTimeline.eventKo: 산업가이자 코크 인더스트리즈 공동 소유주인 데이비드 코크와 결혼

careerTimeline.event: David Koch passed away; Julia inherited his 42% stake in Koch Industries
careerTimeline.eventKo: 데이비드 코크 사망; 줄리아가 코크 인더스트리즈 42% 지분 상속

failures.description: Description of the failure or setback in English
failures.lesson: What they learned or how they recovered
failures.lessonKo: 배운 점이나 극복 과정에 대한 한국어 설명

quotes.contextKo: 언제/왜 이 말을 했는지 한국어 설명

personalTraits.knownFor: What they are most known for in English
personalTraits.knownForKo: 이 인물이 가장 잘 알려진 특징 (한국어)

sajuConnection.note: This field will be written by us. Leave null.

outputFormat: Save as individual JSON files in scripts/deep-bios/ following the file names in the targetList above. One file per person. Each file must have the 'id' field matching the id shown in the targetList.
qualityGuidelines: BILINGUAL: Every text field MUST have both English AND Korean versions. Add 'Ko' suffix for Korean fields.
Korean text should be natural, fluent Korean — NOT literal machine translation. Write as if for a Korean audience.

CRITICAL: Each eventKo MUST be the direct translation of its sibling event field. Do NOT shift, reorder, or mismatch translations. event[0].eventKo translates event[0].event, event[1].eventKo translates event[1].event, etc.
CRITICAL: All netWorth values in wealthHistory must be in BILLIONS USD (e.g., 24.5 means $24.5B). Do NOT use raw numbers like 24500000000.
Include at least 5-8 career timeline events per person
Include at least 2-3 failures/setbacks per person (every billionaire has had them)
Include at least 5 data points in wealthHistory spanning their career (use Forbes/Bloomberg historical data)
Include at least 3 notable quotes with proper attribution
For books: check if they authored any books AND list books they've publicly recommended
personalTraits.knownFor should be 2-3 sentences, specific and vivid, not generic
For less-documented billionaires (heirs, private figures), still fill what you can and mark unknowns as null
Cite sources for each section — this helps us verify accuracy
